title: batatas littoralis
intro: Batatas littoralis, also known as the beach potato or beach yam, is a type of root vegetable that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. Traditionally, the tubers of this plant have been used in folk medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Batatas littoralis are attributed to its ability to help manage diabetes, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the tubers can be dried and ground into a powder, used as a tea, or cooked and consumed as a vegetable.
